mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.cover_image_url AS cover_image, s.price, s.avg_rating, s.heat_score, c.name AS category_name, COUNT(v.id) AS view_count FROM user_spot_view v INNER JOIN spot s ON s.id = v.spot_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.is_published = 1 LEFT JOIN spot_category c ON c.id = s.category_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE v.created_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.cover_image_url, s.price, s.avg_rating, s.heat_score, c.name ORDER BY view_count DESC, s.heat_score DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
